name: Apple and Prune Dressing
recipeIngredient: 10 whole wheat bread cubes, fresh (6 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oil, onion, celery, and apples in a large skillet.
2. Saute for about 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
3. Remove from the heat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients.
5. Gently toss to mix well.
6. Use to stuff a 12- to 18-pound turkey or spoon the stuffing mixture into an oiled 2-quart baking dish.
7. When baking the stuffing in a casserole, cover and bake at 325°F for about 1 hour.
